S.FORM: == Nauru == Takaray Sowal Ona Nauru Kapolongan Kitakit o masowalay a ngangan I o Nauru,pakisowalen no Nauru I Naoero hananay(tayla I lawac no riya), pakiikilisen Nauru hananay, o telang a pangangan no Ikilis I o Pleasant Island(o lipahakay a riyaran pala). Malamikowanan to no Toic I Nawodo anaca o Onawero hananay a masasiromaroma ko pangangan. Itiraay I katimol no Masahadhaday Riyar o cecay a riyaran pala no Mikuronisya riyaran palapalan, o polong a kakahad no sera no Nauru 21.3 km2, o samimingay I polong no kitakit. ((Faylo:Flag of Nauru.svg|thumb|Flag of Nauru)) ((Faylo:Coat of arms of Nauru.svg|thumb|Coat of arms of Nauru)) o dadahal no sera to, o ka'aloman no tamdaw to nani ikoren a misa'osi to polong a kitakit o sakatolo, caay ka hakowa ko katata'ang to Facikan ato Monako Itini i 0 32 S, 166 55 E, noOsiniya ko Nauru. Polong no sekalay i 21 sq km "saka 240 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 21 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 0 sq km " Polong i 9,591 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 20%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 0%, malo no roma to a sera 80%. siyoto O (((Yaren District)) ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakacecay 31 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Baron Waqa , patirengan a romi'ad i 2013 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 11 a romi'ad. Likisi I 'ayaw no 3000 a patek miheca iraay to a tayni mafolaw ko nani Mikulonisya ato Polinisya a tamdaw. Itiya ira ko 12 ko niyaro', oya itiraay I hata(fayafay) a fo'is 12 ko pohong o todongay nona 12 niyaro'. Itiya I 18 sici ira ko nani NiwCilan a kakeridan(sincyo) no tamina manengneng nira kona palapalaan, caay ka papina ko ma'araway a tamdaw ato 'eli a loma', o maan koni sa caka I faloco'en ningra sa ta'elif han ningra. Itiya to I 1798miheca o kakridan no tamina no Ikilis ci Yohani･Fuying macakat tono pala panganganen ningra to Lipahakay Riyaran Pala ,sa onian sato ko malalafalafang to romaroma a kitakit. O kapah no Ikilis ci Wiliyam･Halis yo macakat tona pala I mapatesek I faloco' ningra ko kakapah no kaying no itiniay,cifafahi ta palamit sato ko aro' ningra itini, oya sa'ayaway a congton ci Linoy･Halis o teloc ni Wiliyam･Halis. I 'ayaw no cecay a so'ot miheca misatapang ko Toic a micowat tala Masahadhaday Riyar,malamikowanan no Toic. 1900miheca pakahela ko matayalay no Ikilis to linkuang , na onian sato ko kafalic no 'orip no Nauru a tamdaw. Ona Linkuang hananay I o malohilyo(tahi) no panay ato losay. I sakacecay a kalaloodan no kalokitakit I ma'eco no Awco ,toikor nani 1919miheca o mipolongan a mikowan no Awco,Ikilis ato NiwCilan. I sakatosa a kalaloodan no kalokitakit I o Dipon to ko maro'ay itini, sa tata'ang ko lolood itini, 'aloman ko mapatayay. Malaheci to ko sakatosa a lalood no kalokitakit, yamikowan Awco,Ikilis ato NiwCilan 'odeng o pili'etan aca ko ifaloco'ay a mikakarkar to linkuang ,caay ka pisahalatelateng to 'orip no Nauru a tamdaw. Talipa'elal to ko faloco' no Nauru a tamdaw,I 1968miheca milekal to Niyahpikowan, alaen to a patikol koya linkuang nani kamay no Awco . 1989miheca pakokoten no Nauru I Pisawkitan no Kalokitakit to nika apacang a midipot to taliyok palapalan . 1999miheca malakapot no Linhoko ko Nauru. Palapalaan O kaitiraan no Nauru I sa'etip no Masahadhaday Riyar, I katimol no sasifo'an kinis no cikiw to 42km, o hadahal no polong a sera i 21 km2 masa'araway ko faco. ((Faylo:Nauru satellite.jpg|thumb|Nauru satellite)) o matahepo'ay no linkuang a sera no kitakit 60%, awaay ko 'alo,'edeng I katimol iraay ko cecay a kaheciday a fanaw. Ma'asiay tato ko pikakarkar to linkuang nika makari'ang ko 80% a sera no kitakit,oya pikakarkar halo riyar a makari'ang, 40% a kina'orip no riyar maselen no sota a mapatay. nika awa no 'alo sa awa ko nanom, sanga' hananay ko tanko I tongroh no loma' to sapisoped to 'orad, ano o nini aca caacaay ko mama'edeng sa misanga' ho tolo a sapipalananom to nanom no riyar. Adihay tato ko Linkuang caay ko nananomen ko nanom to kahecid, tatiih sapicefosen to losay. Tamdaw I 2006miheca o tamdaw no Nauru 9,265 tamdaw. Tada ma'asiay to ko pikarkar to Linkuang, malahedaw to I mapingko ko kaysya no Linkuang a malahedaw ko katayalan, laplap hanto a papinokay ko matayalay no Kiripas ato Tufaru 1500 ko tamdadaw. O sowal no sifo I o sowal no Nauru,ira ko 96% no tamdaw ono Nauru a sowal ko sowal i loma', I loma'ay aca ko kasomowal to Nauru, I papotal I o Ikilis ko sakasasowal. O tamdaw no Nauru 58% o Nauru,26% o nani fiyaway a riyaran pala,8% o Yoropa,8% o kaping. O Pitooran O pitooran I tosa no kalitolo o Kristo, cecay no kalitolo o Tinsukyo, ira ho nani Arapiya a Pahaii Pitooran 10%, o saadihayay ko salikaka itini i polong a kitakit. O roma sato o mipaypayay 9%, 2.2% o Musulin. Pakitinien I kinpo a sarikec i mihaiay to paifaloco' ko pitooran, nikawrira, milalangay to The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints ato Yihofa, oninian i sahetoay o Waylaw ko salikaka, matayalay i kaysya no Linkuang. Kyoiku Ira ko 96% a tamdaw ko mafana'ay to tilid,nani 6 tahira I 15 ko mihecaan o caay ka papaysoen a nipacician papitilid, malepon konini I irara ho ko tosa miheca ko paifaloco' sanay a pitilid. Satimolan Masahadhaday Tata'angay Pitilidan iraay ko kapi a pitilidan itini, ya caho mapatireng kona pitilidan I tayra sanay I Auco ato NiwCilan a mitilid to tata'angay pitilidan. Punka O teloc no mikalicay to tamina no Mikulonisya ato Polinisya ko tamdaw no Nauru, o to'as nangra I iraay ko kimad to pakayniay to fafahiyan kawas ci Eijebong, o Buitani i o ifalocoay a fangcalay pala. Itiyaho iraay ko12 kasasiromaroma no finacadan, nikawrira, I 'ayaw cecay a so'ot miheca malahedaway to ko tosa a finacadan. To mihecahecan I 10folad 26romi'ad o pinokayan a romi'ad(Angam Day)hananay, o pika'acangan a romi'ad konini,nawhani, malepon ko sakatosa a lalood no polong a kitakit minokay nani cowacowa ko tamdaw no Nauru, I'ayaw nonini 1500 aca ko polong tamdaw no Nauru, ya ira to ko minokayay a tamdaw I satapang sa a matongal ko palo no tamdaw no kitakit. Micepet to 'ayam no riyar.Nano to'asan tahanini mado'edo ho ko cecay a pinangan no 'orip, samatiya hato o ikisin no niyaro' kona micepetay to 'ayam no riyar. I piceleman no cidal talalawac no riyar ko fainayan,mitikokay to mipa'enoran a ka'ered,tahikeda ko 'ayam matefad ta podpoden malokaka'enen.ci Safulo. Pihapinangan a tilid Nauru. www.oceania.stosunki.pl. (2011年12月3日). (原始內容存檔於2009年5月4日). Nauru Department of Economic Development and Environment. 2003. First National Report To the United Nations Convention to Combat Desertification (UNCCD). Retrieved 2006-05-03. 2006-05-24. Nauru – Wyspa Miła. www.antoranz.net. (2010-02-01). (原始內容存檔於2009-11-25). Nauru Department of Economic Development and Environment. 2003. First National Report To the United Nations Convention to Combat Desertification (UNCCD). Retrieved 2006-05-03. 2006-05-24. ICJ Pleadings, Oral Arguments, Documents, Case Concerning Certain Phosphate Lands in Nauru (Nauru v. Australia) Application: Memorial of Nauru (January, 2004) ISBN 9789210709361 Republic of Nauru. 1999. Climate Change – Response. First National Communication – 1999 . Under the United Nations Framework Convention on Climate Change, United Nations Nauru. www.oceania.stosunki.pl. (2011年12月3日). (原始內容存檔於2009年5月4日) US Department of State. 2003. International Religious Freedom Report 2003 – Nauru URL accessed 2 May 2005.
S.PHON: == nao~u~uro~u~u == takaraj so~uwaɾ o~una nao~u~uro~u~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit o~u maso~uwaɾaj a ŋaŋan i o~u nao~u~uro~u~u,pakiso~uwaɾən no~u nao~u~uro~u~u i nao~uəro~u ħananaj(tajɾa i ɾawaʦ no~u rija), pakiikiɾisən nao~u~uro~u~u ħananaj, o~u təɾaŋ a paŋaŋan no~u ikiɾis i o~u pɾəasant isɾanɬ~ɮ(o~u ɾipaħakaj a rijaran paɾa). maɾamiko~uwanan to~u no~u to~uiʦ i nawo~uɬ~ɮo~u anaʦa o~u o~unawəro~u ħananaj a masasiro~umaro~uma ko~u paŋaŋan. itiraaj i katimo~uɾ no~u masaħaɬ~ɮħaɬ~ɮaj rijar o~u ʦəʦaj a rijaran paɾa no~u miko~u~uro~unisja rijaran paɾapaɾan, o~u po~uɾo~uŋ a kakaħaɬ~ɮ no~u səra no~u nao~u~uro~u~u **.* km*, o~u samimiŋaj i po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kitakit. ((fajɾo~u:fɾa* o~uf nao~u~uro~u~u.sb~v*|tħo~u~umb~b~v|fɾa* o~uf nao~u~uro~u~u)) ((fajɾo~u:ʦo~uat o~uf arms o~uf nao~u~uro~u~u.sb~v*|tħo~u~umb~b~v|ʦo~uat o~uf arms o~uf nao~u~uro~u~u)) o~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾ no~u səra to~u, o~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~u nani iko~urən a misaʡo~usi to~u po~uɾo~uŋ a kitakit o~u sakato~uɾo~u, ʦaaj ka ħako~uwa ko~u katataʡaŋ to~u faʦikan ato~u mo~unako~u itini i * ** s, *** ** ə, no~uo~usinija ko~u nao~u~uro~u~u. po~uɾo~uŋ no~u səkaɾaj i ** s* km "saka *** ko~u rajraj no~u ŋaŋan. " "o~u səkaɾaj no~u səra i, ** s* km, no~u nano~um a səkaɾaj i, * s* km " po~uɾo~uŋ i *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. səra masakiɾaʦ ko~u səra o~u maɾo~u kakao~umaħən a səra **%, maɾo~u no~u kiɾakiɾaŋan a səra *%, maɾo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a səra **%. sijo~uto~u o~u (((jarən ɬ~ɮistriʦt)) ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umirəŋan no~u kitakit a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ piħiratəŋan no~u kitakit a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i sakaʦəʦaj ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. o~u sawaraʡan no~u kitakit anini i ʦi b~b~varo~un wa*a , patirəŋan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i **** a miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. ɾikisi i ʡajaw no~u **** a patək miħəʦa iraaj to~u a tajni mafo~uɾaw ko~u nani miko~u~uɾo~unisja ato~u po~uɾinisja a tamɬ~ɮaw. itija ira ko~u ** ko~u nijaro~uʡ, o~uja itiraaj i ħata(fajafaj) a fo~uʡis ** ko~u po~uħo~uŋ o~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~una ** nijaro~uʡ. itija i ** siʦi ira ko~u nani niwʦiɾan a kakəriɬ~ɮan(sinʦjo~u) no~u tamina manəŋnəŋ nira ko~una paɾapaɾaan, ʦaaj ka papina ko~u maʡarawaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u ʡəɾi a ɾo~umaʡ, o~u maan ko~uni sa ʦaka i faɾo~uʦo~uʡən niŋra sa taʡəɾif ħan niŋra. itija to~u i ****miħəʦa o~u kakriɬ~ɮan no~u tamina no~u ikiɾis ʦi jo~uħani*fo~u~ujiŋ maʦakat to~uno~u paɾa paŋaŋanən niŋra to~u ɾipaħakaj rijaran paɾa ,sa o~unian sato~u ko~u maɾaɾafaɾafaŋ to~u ro~umaro~uma a kitakit. o~u kapaħ no~u ikiɾis ʦi wiɾijam*ħaɾis jo~u maʦakat to~una paɾa i mapatəsək i faɾo~uʦo~uʡ niŋra ko~u kakapaħ no~u kajiŋ no~u itiniaj,ʦifafaħi ta paɾamit sato~u ko~u aro~uʡ niŋra itini, o~uja saʡajawaj a ʦo~uŋto~un ʦi ɾino~uj*ħaɾis o~u təɾo~uʦ ni wiɾijam*ħaɾis. i ʡajaw no~u ʦəʦaj a so~uʡo~ut miħəʦa misatapaŋ ko~u to~uiʦ a miʦo~uwat taɾa masaħaɬ~ɮħaɬ~ɮaj rijar,maɾamiko~uwanan no~u to~uiʦ. ****miħəʦa pakaħəɾa ko~u matajaɾaj no~u ikiɾis to~u ɾinko~u~uaŋ , na o~unian sato~u ko~u kafaɾiʦ no~u ʡo~urip no~u nao~u~uro~u~u a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~una ɾinko~u~uaŋ ħananaj i o~u maɾo~uħiɾjo~u(taħi) no~u panaj ato~u ɾo~usaj. i sakaʦəʦaj a kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan no~u kaɾo~ukitakit i maʡəʦo~u no~u awʦo~u ,to~uiko~ur nani ****miħəʦa o~u mipo~uɾo~uŋan a miko~uwan no~u awʦo~u,ikiɾis ato~u niwʦiɾan. i sakato~usa a kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan no~u kaɾo~ukitakit i o~u ɬ~ɮipo~un to~u ko~u maro~uʡaj itini, sa tataʡaŋ ko~u ɾo~uɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ itini, ʡaɾo~uman ko~u mapatajaj. maɾaħəʦi to~u ko~u sakato~usa a ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u kaɾo~ukitakit, jamiko~uwan awʦo~u,ikiɾis ato~u niwʦiɾan ʡo~uɬ~ɮəŋ o~u piɾiʡətan aʦa ko~u ifaɾo~uʦo~uʡaj a mikakarkar to~u ɾinko~u~uaŋ ,ʦaaj ka pisaħaɾatəɾatəŋ to~u ʡo~urip no~u nao~u~uro~u~u a tamɬ~ɮaw. taɾipaʡəɾaɾ to~u ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u nao~u~uro~u~u a tamɬ~ɮaw,i ****miħəʦa miɾəkaɾ to~u nijaħpiko~uwan, aɾaən to~u a patiko~uɾ ko~uja ɾinko~u~uaŋ nani kamaj no~u awʦo~u . ****miħəʦa pako~uko~utən no~u nao~u~uro~u~u i pisawkitan no~u kaɾo~ukitakit to~u nika apaʦaŋ a miɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u taɾijo~uk paɾapaɾan . ****miħəʦa maɾakapo~ut no~u ɾinħo~uko~u ko~u nao~u~uro~u~u. paɾapaɾaan o~u kaitiraan no~u nao~u~uro~u~u i saʡətip no~u masaħaɬ~ɮħaɬ~ɮaj rijar, i katimo~uɾ no~u sasifo~uʡan kinis no~u ʦikiw to~u **km, o~u ħaɬ~ɮaħaɾ no~u po~uɾo~uŋ a səra i ** km* masaʡarawaj ko~u faʦo~u. ((fajɾo~u:nao~u~uro~u~u satəɾɾitə.jp*|tħo~u~umb~b~v|nao~u~uro~u~u satəɾɾitə)) o~u mataħəpo~uʡaj no~u ɾinko~u~uaŋ a səra no~u kitakit **%, awaaj ko~u ʡaɾo~u,ʡəɬ~ɮəŋ i katimo~uɾ iraaj ko~u ʦəʦaj a kaħəʦiɬ~ɮaj a fanaw. maʡasiaj tato~u ko~u pikakarkar to~u ɾinko~u~uaŋ nika makariʡaŋ ko~u **% a səra no~u kitakit,o~uja pikakarkar ħaɾo~u rijar a makariʡaŋ, **% a kinaʡo~urip no~u rijar masəɾən no~u so~uta a mapataj. nika awa no~u ʡaɾo~u sa awa ko~u nano~um, saŋaʡ ħananaj ko~u tanko~u i to~uŋro~uħ no~u ɾo~umaʡ to~u sapiso~upəɬ~ɮ to~u ʡo~uraɬ~ɮ, ano~u o~u nini aʦa ʦaaʦaaj ko~u mamaʡəɬ~ɮəŋ sa misaŋaʡ ħo~u to~uɾo~u a sapipaɾanano~um to~u nano~um no~u rijar. aɬ~ɮiħaj tato~u ko~u ɾinko~u~uaŋ ʦaaj ko~u nanano~umən ko~u nano~um to~u kaħəʦiɬ~ɮ, tatiiħ sapiʦəfo~usən to~u ɾo~usaj. tamɬ~ɮaw i ****miħəʦa o~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u nao~u~uro~u~u *,*** tamɬ~ɮaw. taɬ~ɮa maʡasiaj to~u ko~u pikarkar to~u ɾinko~u~uaŋ, maɾaħəɬ~ɮaw to~u i mapiŋko~u ko~u kajsja no~u ɾinko~u~uaŋ a maɾaħəɬ~ɮaw ko~u katajaɾan, ɾapɾap ħanto~u a papino~ukaj ko~u matajaɾaj no~u kiripas ato~u to~u~ufaro~u~u **** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaw. o~u so~uwaɾ no~u sifo~u i o~u so~uwaɾ no~u nao~u~uro~u~u,ira ko~u **% no~u tamɬ~ɮaw o~uno~u nao~u~uro~u~u a so~uwaɾ ko~u so~uwaɾ i ɾo~umaʡ, i ɾo~umaʡaj aʦa ko~u kaso~umo~uwaɾ to~u nao~u~uro~u~u, i papo~utaɾ i o~u ikiɾis ko~u sakasaso~uwaɾ. o~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u nao~u~uro~u~u **% o~u nao~u~uro~u~u,**% o~u nani fijawaj a rijaran paɾa,*% o~u jo~uro~upa,*% o~u kapiŋ. o~u pito~uo~uran o~u pito~uo~uran i to~usa no~u kaɾito~uɾo~u o~u kristo~u, ʦəʦaj no~u kaɾito~uɾo~u o~u tinso~u~ukjo~u, ira ħo~u nani arapija a paħaii pito~uo~uran **%, o~u saaɬ~ɮiħajaj ko~u saɾikaka itini i po~uɾo~uŋ a kitakit. o~u ro~uma sato~u o~u mipajpajaj *%, *.*% o~u mo~u~uso~u~uɾin. pakitiniən i kinpo~u a sarikəʦ i miħaiaj to~u paifaɾo~uʦo~uʡ ko~u pito~uo~uran, nikawrira, miɾaɾaŋaj to~u tħə ʦħo~u~urʦħ o~uf *əso~u~us ʦħrist o~uf ɾattər-ɬ~ɮaj saints ato~u jiħo~ufa, o~uninian i saħəto~uaj o~u wajɾaw ko~u saɾikaka, matajaɾaj i kajsja no~u ɾinko~u~uaŋ. kjo~uiko~u~u ira ko~u **% a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u mafanaʡaj to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ,nani * taħira i ** ko~u miħəʦaan o~u ʦaaj ka papajso~uən a nipaʦiʦian papitiɾiɬ~ɮ, maɾəpo~un ko~unini i irara ħo~u ko~u to~usa miħəʦa ko~u paifaɾo~uʦo~uʡ sanaj a pitiɾiɬ~ɮ. satimo~uɾan masaħaɬ~ɮħaɬ~ɮaj tataʡaŋaj pitiɾiɬ~ɮan iraaj ko~u kapi a pitiɾiɬ~ɮan itini, ja ʦaħo~u mapatirəŋ ko~una pitiɾiɬ~ɮan i tajra sanaj i ao~u~uʦo~u ato~u niwʦiɾan a mitiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u tataʡaŋaj pitiɾiɬ~ɮan. po~u~unka o~u təɾo~uʦ no~u mikaɾiʦaj to~u tamina no~u miko~u~uɾo~unisja ato~u po~uɾinisja ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u nao~u~uro~u~u, o~u to~uʡas naŋra i iraaj ko~u kimaɬ~ɮ to~u pakajniaj to~u fafaħijan kawas ʦi əijəb~b~vo~uŋ, o~u b~b~vo~u~uitani i o~u ifaɾo~uʦo~uaj a faŋʦaɾaj paɾa. itijaħo~u iraaj ko~u** kasasiro~umaro~uma no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan, nikawrira, i ʡajaw ʦəʦaj a so~uʡo~ut miħəʦa maɾaħəɬ~ɮawaj to~u ko~u to~usa a finaʦaɬ~ɮan. to~u miħəʦaħəʦan i **fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ **ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ o~u pino~ukajan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ(aŋam ɬ~ɮaj)ħananaj, o~u pikaʡaʦaŋan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ko~unini,nawħani, maɾəpo~un ko~u sakato~usa a ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u po~uɾo~uŋ a kitakit mino~ukaj nani ʦo~uwaʦo~uwa ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u nao~u~uro~u~u, iʡajaw no~unini **** aʦa ko~u po~uɾo~uŋ tamɬ~ɮaw no~u nao~u~uro~u~u, ja ira to~u ko~u mino~ukajaj a tamɬ~ɮaw i satapaŋ sa a mato~uŋaɾ ko~u paɾo~u no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kitakit. miʦəpət to~u ʡajam no~u rijar.nano~u to~uʡasan taħanini maɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~u ħo~u ko~u ʦəʦaj a pinaŋan no~u ʡo~urip, samatija ħato~u o~u ikisin no~u nijaro~uʡ ko~una miʦəpətaj to~u ʡajam no~u rijar. i piʦəɾəman no~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ taɾaɾawaʦ no~u rijar ko~u fainajan,mitiko~ukaj to~u mipaʡəno~uran a kaʡərəɬ~ɮ,taħikəɬ~ɮa ko~u ʡajam matəfaɬ~ɮ ta po~uɬ~ɮpo~uɬ~ɮən maɾo~ukakaʡənən.ʦi safo~u~uɾo~u. piħapinaŋan a tiɾiɬ~ɮ nao~u~uro~u~u. www.o~uʦəania.sto~uso~u~unki.pɾ. (**********). (****************). nao~u~uro~u~u ɬ~ɮəpartmənt o~uf əʦo~uno~umiʦ ɬ~ɮəb~vəɾo~upmənt anɬ~ɮ ənb~viro~unmənt. ****. first natio~unaɾ rəpo~urt to~u tħə o~u~unitəɬ~ɮ natio~uns ʦo~unb~vəntio~un to~u ʦo~umb~b~vat ɬ~ɮəsərtifiʦatio~un (o~u~unʦʦɬ~ɮ). rətriəb~vəɬ~ɮ ****-**-**. ****-**-**. nao~u~uro~u~u * wjspa mi*a. www.anto~uran*.nət. (****-**-**). (***********-**-**). nao~u~uro~u~u ɬ~ɮəpartmənt o~uf əʦo~uno~umiʦ ɬ~ɮəb~vəɾo~upmənt anɬ~ɮ ənb~viro~unmənt. ****. first natio~unaɾ rəpo~urt to~u tħə o~u~unitəɬ~ɮ natio~uns ʦo~unb~vəntio~un to~u ʦo~umb~b~vat ɬ~ɮəsərtifiʦatio~un (o~u~unʦʦɬ~ɮ). rətriəb~vəɬ~ɮ ****-**-**. ****-**-**. iʦ* pɾəaɬ~ɮiŋs, o~uraɾ ar*o~u~umənts, ɬ~ɮo~uʦo~u~umənts, ʦasə ʦo~unʦərniŋ ʦərtain pħo~uspħatə ɾanɬ~ɮs in nao~u~uro~u~u (nao~u~uro~u~u b~v. ao~u~ustraɾia) appɾiʦatio~un: məmo~uriaɾ o~uf nao~u~uro~u~u (*ano~u~uarj, ****) isb~b~vn ************* rəpo~u~ub~b~vɾiʦ o~uf nao~u~uro~u~u. ****. ʦɾimatə ʦħaŋə * rəspo~unsə. first natio~unaɾ ʦo~ummo~u~uniʦatio~un * **** . o~u~unɬ~ɮər tħə o~u~unitəɬ~ɮ natio~uns framəwo~urk ʦo~unb~vəntio~un o~un ʦɾimatə ʦħaŋə, o~u~unitəɬ~ɮ natio~uns nao~u~uro~u~u. www.o~uʦəania.sto~uso~u~unki.pɾ. (**********). (****************) o~u~us ɬ~ɮəpartmənt o~uf statə. ****. intərnatio~unaɾ rəɾi*io~uo~u~us frəəɬ~ɮo~um rəpo~urt **** * nao~u~uro~u~u o~u~urɾ aʦʦəssəɬ~ɮ * maj ****.
S.FORM: == Nauru == Takaray Sowal Ona Nauru Kapolongan Kitakit o masowalay a ngangan I o Nauru,pakisowalen no Nauru I Naoero hananay(tayla I lawac no riya), pakiikilisen Nauru hananay, o telang a pangangan no Ikilis I o Pleasant Island(o lipahakay a riyaran pala). Malamikowanan to no Toic I Nawodo anaca o Onawero hananay a masasiromaroma ko pangangan. Itiraay I katimol no Masahadhaday Riyar o cecay a riyaran pala no Mikuronisya riyaran palapalan, o polong a kakahad no sera no Nauru 21.3 km2, o samimingay I polong no kitakit. ((Faylo:Flag of Nauru.svg|thumb|Flag of Nauru)) ((Faylo:Coat of arms of Nauru.svg|thumb|Coat of arms of Nauru)) o dadahal no sera to, o ka'aloman no tamdaw to nani ikoren a misa'osi to polong a kitakit o sakatolo, caay ka hakowa ko katata'ang to Facikan ato Monako Itini i 0 32 S, 166 55 E, noOsiniya ko Nauru. Polong no sekalay i 21 sq km "saka 240 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 21 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 0 sq km " Polong i 9,591 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 20%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 0%, malo no roma to a sera 80%. siyoto O (((Yaren District)) ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakacecay 31 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Baron Waqa , patirengan a romi'ad i 2013 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 11 a romi'ad. Likisi I 'ayaw no 3000 a patek miheca iraay to a tayni mafolaw ko nani Mikulonisya ato Polinisya a tamdaw. Itiya ira ko 12 ko niyaro', oya itiraay I hata(fayafay) a fo'is 12 ko pohong o todongay nona 12 niyaro'. Itiya I 18 sici ira ko nani NiwCilan a kakeridan(sincyo) no tamina manengneng nira kona palapalaan, caay ka papina ko ma'araway a tamdaw ato 'eli a loma', o maan koni sa caka I faloco'en ningra sa ta'elif han ningra. Itiya to I 1798miheca o kakridan no tamina no Ikilis ci Yohani･Fuying macakat tono pala panganganen ningra to Lipahakay Riyaran Pala ,sa onian sato ko malalafalafang to romaroma a kitakit. O kapah no Ikilis ci Wiliyam･Halis yo macakat tona pala I mapatesek I faloco' ningra ko kakapah no kaying no itiniay,cifafahi ta palamit sato ko aro' ningra itini, oya sa'ayaway a congton ci Linoy･Halis o teloc ni Wiliyam･Halis. I 'ayaw no cecay a so'ot miheca misatapang ko Toic a micowat tala Masahadhaday Riyar,malamikowanan no Toic. 1900miheca pakahela ko matayalay no Ikilis to linkuang , na onian sato ko kafalic no 'orip no Nauru a tamdaw. Ona Linkuang hananay I o malohilyo(tahi) no panay ato losay. I sakacecay a kalaloodan no kalokitakit I ma'eco no Awco ,toikor nani 1919miheca o mipolongan a mikowan no Awco,Ikilis ato NiwCilan. I sakatosa a kalaloodan no kalokitakit I o Dipon to ko maro'ay itini, sa tata'ang ko lolood itini, 'aloman ko mapatayay. Malaheci to ko sakatosa a lalood no kalokitakit, yamikowan Awco,Ikilis ato NiwCilan 'odeng o pili'etan aca ko ifaloco'ay a mikakarkar to linkuang ,caay ka pisahalatelateng to 'orip no Nauru a tamdaw. Talipa'elal to ko faloco' no Nauru a tamdaw,I 1968miheca milekal to Niyahpikowan, alaen to a patikol koya linkuang nani kamay no Awco . 1989miheca pakokoten no Nauru I Pisawkitan no Kalokitakit to nika apacang a midipot to taliyok palapalan . 1999miheca malakapot no Linhoko ko Nauru. Palapalaan O kaitiraan no Nauru I sa'etip no Masahadhaday Riyar, I katimol no sasifo'an kinis no cikiw to 42km, o hadahal no polong a sera i 21 km2 masa'araway ko faco. ((Faylo:Nauru satellite.jpg|thumb|Nauru satellite)) o matahepo'ay no linkuang a sera no kitakit 60%, awaay ko 'alo,'edeng I katimol iraay ko cecay a kaheciday a fanaw. Ma'asiay tato ko pikakarkar to linkuang nika makari'ang ko 80% a sera no kitakit,oya pikakarkar halo riyar a makari'ang, 40% a kina'orip no riyar maselen no sota a mapatay. nika awa no 'alo sa awa ko nanom, sanga' hananay ko tanko I tongroh no loma' to sapisoped to 'orad, ano o nini aca caacaay ko mama'edeng sa misanga' ho tolo a sapipalananom to nanom no riyar. Adihay tato ko Linkuang caay ko nananomen ko nanom to kahecid, tatiih sapicefosen to losay. Tamdaw I 2006miheca o tamdaw no Nauru 9,265 tamdaw. Tada ma'asiay to ko pikarkar to Linkuang, malahedaw to I mapingko ko kaysya no Linkuang a malahedaw ko katayalan, laplap hanto a papinokay ko matayalay no Kiripas ato Tufaru 1500 ko tamdadaw. O sowal no sifo I o sowal no Nauru,ira ko 96% no tamdaw ono Nauru a sowal ko sowal i loma', I loma'ay aca ko kasomowal to Nauru, I papotal I o Ikilis ko sakasasowal. O tamdaw no Nauru 58% o Nauru,26% o nani fiyaway a riyaran pala,8% o Yoropa,8% o kaping. O Pitooran O pitooran I tosa no kalitolo o Kristo, cecay no kalitolo o Tinsukyo, ira ho nani Arapiya a Pahaii Pitooran 10%, o saadihayay ko salikaka itini i polong a kitakit. O roma sato o mipaypayay 9%, 2.2% o Musulin. Pakitinien I kinpo a sarikec i mihaiay to paifaloco' ko pitooran, nikawrira, milalangay to The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints ato Yihofa, oninian i sahetoay o Waylaw ko salikaka, matayalay i kaysya no Linkuang. Kyoiku Ira ko 96% a tamdaw ko mafana'ay to tilid,nani 6 tahira I 15 ko mihecaan o caay ka papaysoen a nipacician papitilid, malepon konini I irara ho ko tosa miheca ko paifaloco' sanay a pitilid. Satimolan Masahadhaday Tata'angay Pitilidan iraay ko kapi a pitilidan itini, ya caho mapatireng kona pitilidan I tayra sanay I Auco ato NiwCilan a mitilid to tata'angay pitilidan. Punka O teloc no mikalicay to tamina no Mikulonisya ato Polinisya ko tamdaw no Nauru, o to'as nangra I iraay ko kimad to pakayniay to fafahiyan kawas ci Eijebong, o Buitani i o ifalocoay a fangcalay pala. Itiyaho iraay ko12 kasasiromaroma no finacadan, nikawrira, I 'ayaw cecay a so'ot miheca malahedaway to ko tosa a finacadan. To mihecahecan I 10folad 26romi'ad o pinokayan a romi'ad(Angam Day)hananay, o pika'acangan a romi'ad konini,nawhani, malepon ko sakatosa a lalood no polong a kitakit minokay nani cowacowa ko tamdaw no Nauru, I'ayaw nonini 1500 aca ko polong tamdaw no Nauru, ya ira to ko minokayay a tamdaw I satapang sa a matongal ko palo no tamdaw no kitakit. Micepet to 'ayam no riyar.Nano to'asan tahanini mado'edo ho ko cecay a pinangan no 'orip, samatiya hato o ikisin no niyaro' kona micepetay to 'ayam no riyar. I piceleman no cidal talalawac no riyar ko fainayan,mitikokay to mipa'enoran a ka'ered,tahikeda ko 'ayam matefad ta podpoden malokaka'enen.ci Safulo. Pihapinangan a tilid Nauru. www.oceania.stosunki.pl. (2011年12月3日). (原始內容存檔於2009年5月4日). Nauru Department of Economic Development and Environment. 2003. First National Report To the United Nations Convention to Combat Desertification (UNCCD). Retrieved 2006-05-03. 2006-05-24. Nauru – Wyspa Miła. www.antoranz.net. (2010-02-01). (原始內容存檔於2009-11-25). Nauru Department of Economic Development and Environment. 2003. First National Report To the United Nations Convention to Combat Desertification (UNCCD). Retrieved 2006-05-03. 2006-05-24. ICJ Pleadings, Oral Arguments, Documents, Case Concerning Certain Phosphate Lands in Nauru (Nauru v. Australia) Application: Memorial of Nauru (January, 2004) ISBN 9789210709361 Republic of Nauru. 1999. Climate Change – Response. First National Communication – 1999 . Under the United Nations Framework Convention on Climate Change, United Nations Nauru. www.oceania.stosunki.pl. (2011年12月3日). (原始內容存檔於2009年5月4日) US Department of State. 2003. International Religious Freedom Report 2003 – Nauru URL accessed 2 May 2005.
S.PHON: == nao~u~uro~u~u == takaraj so~uwaɾ o~una nao~u~uro~u~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit o~u maso~uwaɾaj a ŋaŋan i o~u nao~u~uro~u~u,pakiso~uwaɾən no~u nao~u~uro~u~u i nao~uəro~u ħananaj(tajɾa i ɾawaʦ no~u rija), pakiikiɾisən nao~u~uro~u~u ħananaj, o~u təɾaŋ a paŋaŋan no~u ikiɾis i o~u pɾəasant isɾanɬ~ɮ(o~u ɾipaħakaj a rijaran paɾa). maɾamiko~uwanan to~u no~u to~uiʦ i nawo~uɬ~ɮo~u anaʦa o~u o~unawəro~u ħananaj a masasiro~umaro~uma ko~u paŋaŋan. itiraaj i katimo~uɾ no~u masaħaɬ~ɮħaɬ~ɮaj rijar o~u ʦəʦaj a rijaran paɾa no~u miko~u~uro~unisja rijaran paɾapaɾan, o~u po~uɾo~uŋ a kakaħaɬ~ɮ no~u səra no~u nao~u~uro~u~u **.* km*, o~u samimiŋaj i po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kitakit. ((fajɾo~u:fɾa* o~uf nao~u~uro~u~u.sb~v*|tħo~u~umb~b~v|fɾa* o~uf nao~u~uro~u~u)) ((fajɾo~u:ʦo~uat o~uf arms o~uf nao~u~uro~u~u.sb~v*|tħo~u~umb~b~v|ʦo~uat o~uf arms o~uf nao~u~uro~u~u)) o~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾ no~u səra to~u, o~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~u nani iko~urən a misaʡo~usi to~u po~uɾo~uŋ a kitakit o~u sakato~uɾo~u, ʦaaj ka ħako~uwa ko~u katataʡaŋ to~u faʦikan ato~u mo~unako~u itini i * ** s, *** ** ə, no~uo~usinija ko~u nao~u~uro~u~u. po~uɾo~uŋ no~u səkaɾaj i ** s* km "saka *** ko~u rajraj no~u ŋaŋan. " "o~u səkaɾaj no~u səra i, ** s* km, no~u nano~um a səkaɾaj i, * s* km " po~uɾo~uŋ i *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. səra masakiɾaʦ ko~u səra o~u maɾo~u kakao~umaħən a səra **%, maɾo~u no~u kiɾakiɾaŋan a səra *%, maɾo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a səra **%. sijo~uto~u o~u (((jarən ɬ~ɮistriʦt)) ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umirəŋan no~u kitakit a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ piħiratəŋan no~u kitakit a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i sakaʦəʦaj ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. o~u sawaraʡan no~u kitakit anini i ʦi b~b~varo~un wa*a , patirəŋan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i **** a miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. ɾikisi i ʡajaw no~u **** a patək miħəʦa iraaj to~u a tajni mafo~uɾaw ko~u nani miko~u~uɾo~unisja ato~u po~uɾinisja a tamɬ~ɮaw. itija ira ko~u ** ko~u nijaro~uʡ, o~uja itiraaj i ħata(fajafaj) a fo~uʡis ** ko~u po~uħo~uŋ o~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~una ** nijaro~uʡ. itija i ** siʦi ira ko~u nani niwʦiɾan a kakəriɬ~ɮan(sinʦjo~u) no~u tamina manəŋnəŋ nira ko~una paɾapaɾaan, ʦaaj ka papina ko~u maʡarawaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u ʡəɾi a ɾo~umaʡ, o~u maan ko~uni sa ʦaka i faɾo~uʦo~uʡən niŋra sa taʡəɾif ħan niŋra. itija to~u i ****miħəʦa o~u kakriɬ~ɮan no~u tamina no~u ikiɾis ʦi jo~uħani*fo~u~ujiŋ maʦakat to~uno~u paɾa paŋaŋanən niŋra to~u ɾipaħakaj rijaran paɾa ,sa o~unian sato~u ko~u maɾaɾafaɾafaŋ to~u ro~umaro~uma a kitakit. o~u kapaħ no~u ikiɾis ʦi wiɾijam*ħaɾis jo~u maʦakat to~una paɾa i mapatəsək i faɾo~uʦo~uʡ niŋra ko~u kakapaħ no~u kajiŋ no~u itiniaj,ʦifafaħi ta paɾamit sato~u ko~u aro~uʡ niŋra itini, o~uja saʡajawaj a ʦo~uŋto~un ʦi ɾino~uj*ħaɾis o~u təɾo~uʦ ni wiɾijam*ħaɾis. i ʡajaw no~u ʦəʦaj a so~uʡo~ut miħəʦa misatapaŋ ko~u to~uiʦ a miʦo~uwat taɾa masaħaɬ~ɮħaɬ~ɮaj rijar,maɾamiko~uwanan no~u to~uiʦ. ****miħəʦa pakaħəɾa ko~u matajaɾaj no~u ikiɾis to~u ɾinko~u~uaŋ , na o~unian sato~u ko~u kafaɾiʦ no~u ʡo~urip no~u nao~u~uro~u~u a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~una ɾinko~u~uaŋ ħananaj i o~u maɾo~uħiɾjo~u(taħi) no~u panaj ato~u ɾo~usaj. i sakaʦəʦaj a kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan no~u kaɾo~ukitakit i maʡəʦo~u no~u awʦo~u ,to~uiko~ur nani ****miħəʦa o~u mipo~uɾo~uŋan a miko~uwan no~u awʦo~u,ikiɾis ato~u niwʦiɾan. i sakato~usa a kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan no~u kaɾo~ukitakit i o~u ɬ~ɮipo~un to~u ko~u maro~uʡaj itini, sa tataʡaŋ ko~u ɾo~uɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ itini, ʡaɾo~uman ko~u mapatajaj. maɾaħəʦi to~u ko~u sakato~usa a ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u kaɾo~ukitakit, jamiko~uwan awʦo~u,ikiɾis ato~u niwʦiɾan ʡo~uɬ~ɮəŋ o~u piɾiʡətan aʦa ko~u ifaɾo~uʦo~uʡaj a mikakarkar to~u ɾinko~u~uaŋ ,ʦaaj ka pisaħaɾatəɾatəŋ to~u ʡo~urip no~u nao~u~uro~u~u a tamɬ~ɮaw. taɾipaʡəɾaɾ to~u ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u nao~u~uro~u~u a tamɬ~ɮaw,i ****miħəʦa miɾəkaɾ to~u nijaħpiko~uwan, aɾaən to~u a patiko~uɾ ko~uja ɾinko~u~uaŋ nani kamaj no~u awʦo~u . ****miħəʦa pako~uko~utən no~u nao~u~uro~u~u i pisawkitan no~u kaɾo~ukitakit to~u nika apaʦaŋ a miɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u taɾijo~uk paɾapaɾan . ****miħəʦa maɾakapo~ut no~u ɾinħo~uko~u ko~u nao~u~uro~u~u. paɾapaɾaan o~u kaitiraan no~u nao~u~uro~u~u i saʡətip no~u masaħaɬ~ɮħaɬ~ɮaj rijar, i katimo~uɾ no~u sasifo~uʡan kinis no~u ʦikiw to~u **km, o~u ħaɬ~ɮaħaɾ no~u po~uɾo~uŋ a səra i ** km* masaʡarawaj ko~u faʦo~u. ((fajɾo~u:nao~u~uro~u~u satəɾɾitə.jp*|tħo~u~umb~b~v|nao~u~uro~u~u satəɾɾitə)) o~u mataħəpo~uʡaj no~u ɾinko~u~uaŋ a səra no~u kitakit **%, awaaj ko~u ʡaɾo~u,ʡəɬ~ɮəŋ i katimo~uɾ iraaj ko~u ʦəʦaj a kaħəʦiɬ~ɮaj a fanaw. maʡasiaj tato~u ko~u pikakarkar to~u ɾinko~u~uaŋ nika makariʡaŋ ko~u **% a səra no~u kitakit,o~uja pikakarkar ħaɾo~u rijar a makariʡaŋ, **% a kinaʡo~urip no~u rijar masəɾən no~u so~uta a mapataj. nika awa no~u ʡaɾo~u sa awa ko~u nano~um, saŋaʡ ħananaj ko~u tanko~u i to~uŋro~uħ no~u ɾo~umaʡ to~u sapiso~upəɬ~ɮ to~u ʡo~uraɬ~ɮ, ano~u o~u nini aʦa ʦaaʦaaj ko~u mamaʡəɬ~ɮəŋ sa misaŋaʡ ħo~u to~uɾo~u a sapipaɾanano~um to~u nano~um no~u rijar. aɬ~ɮiħaj tato~u ko~u ɾinko~u~uaŋ ʦaaj ko~u nanano~umən ko~u nano~um to~u kaħəʦiɬ~ɮ, tatiiħ sapiʦəfo~usən to~u ɾo~usaj. tamɬ~ɮaw i ****miħəʦa o~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u nao~u~uro~u~u *,*** tamɬ~ɮaw. taɬ~ɮa maʡasiaj to~u ko~u pikarkar to~u ɾinko~u~uaŋ, maɾaħəɬ~ɮaw to~u i mapiŋko~u ko~u kajsja no~u ɾinko~u~uaŋ a maɾaħəɬ~ɮaw ko~u katajaɾan, ɾapɾap ħanto~u a papino~ukaj ko~u matajaɾaj no~u kiripas ato~u to~u~ufaro~u~u **** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaw. o~u so~uwaɾ no~u sifo~u i o~u so~uwaɾ no~u nao~u~uro~u~u,ira ko~u **% no~u tamɬ~ɮaw o~uno~u nao~u~uro~u~u a so~uwaɾ ko~u so~uwaɾ i ɾo~umaʡ, i ɾo~umaʡaj aʦa ko~u kaso~umo~uwaɾ to~u nao~u~uro~u~u, i papo~utaɾ i o~u ikiɾis ko~u sakasaso~uwaɾ. o~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u nao~u~uro~u~u **% o~u nao~u~uro~u~u,**% o~u nani fijawaj a rijaran paɾa,*% o~u jo~uro~upa,*% o~u kapiŋ. o~u pito~uo~uran o~u pito~uo~uran i to~usa no~u kaɾito~uɾo~u o~u kristo~u, ʦəʦaj no~u kaɾito~uɾo~u o~u tinso~u~ukjo~u, ira ħo~u nani arapija a paħaii pito~uo~uran **%, o~u saaɬ~ɮiħajaj ko~u saɾikaka itini i po~uɾo~uŋ a kitakit. o~u ro~uma sato~u o~u mipajpajaj *%, *.*% o~u mo~u~uso~u~uɾin. pakitiniən i kinpo~u a sarikəʦ i miħaiaj to~u paifaɾo~uʦo~uʡ ko~u pito~uo~uran, nikawrira, miɾaɾaŋaj to~u tħə ʦħo~u~urʦħ o~uf *əso~u~us ʦħrist o~uf ɾattər-ɬ~ɮaj saints ato~u jiħo~ufa, o~uninian i saħəto~uaj o~u wajɾaw ko~u saɾikaka, matajaɾaj i kajsja no~u ɾinko~u~uaŋ. kjo~uiko~u~u ira ko~u **% a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u mafanaʡaj to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ,nani * taħira i ** ko~u miħəʦaan o~u ʦaaj ka papajso~uən a nipaʦiʦian papitiɾiɬ~ɮ, maɾəpo~un ko~unini i irara ħo~u ko~u to~usa miħəʦa ko~u paifaɾo~uʦo~uʡ sanaj a pitiɾiɬ~ɮ. satimo~uɾan masaħaɬ~ɮħaɬ~ɮaj tataʡaŋaj pitiɾiɬ~ɮan iraaj ko~u kapi a pitiɾiɬ~ɮan itini, ja ʦaħo~u mapatirəŋ ko~una pitiɾiɬ~ɮan i tajra sanaj i ao~u~uʦo~u ato~u niwʦiɾan a mitiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u tataʡaŋaj pitiɾiɬ~ɮan. po~u~unka o~u təɾo~uʦ no~u mikaɾiʦaj to~u tamina no~u miko~u~uɾo~unisja ato~u po~uɾinisja ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u nao~u~uro~u~u, o~u to~uʡas naŋra i iraaj ko~u kimaɬ~ɮ to~u pakajniaj to~u fafaħijan kawas ʦi əijəb~b~vo~uŋ, o~u b~b~vo~u~uitani i o~u ifaɾo~uʦo~uaj a faŋʦaɾaj paɾa. itijaħo~u iraaj ko~u** kasasiro~umaro~uma no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan, nikawrira, i ʡajaw ʦəʦaj a so~uʡo~ut miħəʦa maɾaħəɬ~ɮawaj to~u ko~u to~usa a finaʦaɬ~ɮan. to~u miħəʦaħəʦan i **fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ **ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ o~u pino~ukajan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ(aŋam ɬ~ɮaj)ħananaj, o~u pikaʡaʦaŋan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ko~unini,nawħani, maɾəpo~un ko~u sakato~usa a ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u po~uɾo~uŋ a kitakit mino~ukaj nani ʦo~uwaʦo~uwa ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u nao~u~uro~u~u, iʡajaw no~unini **** aʦa ko~u po~uɾo~uŋ tamɬ~ɮaw no~u nao~u~uro~u~u, ja ira to~u ko~u mino~ukajaj a tamɬ~ɮaw i satapaŋ sa a mato~uŋaɾ ko~u paɾo~u no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kitakit. miʦəpət to~u ʡajam no~u rijar.nano~u to~uʡasan taħanini maɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~u ħo~u ko~u ʦəʦaj a pinaŋan no~u ʡo~urip, samatija ħato~u o~u ikisin no~u nijaro~uʡ ko~una miʦəpətaj to~u ʡajam no~u rijar. i piʦəɾəman no~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ taɾaɾawaʦ no~u rijar ko~u fainajan,mitiko~ukaj to~u mipaʡəno~uran a kaʡərəɬ~ɮ,taħikəɬ~ɮa ko~u ʡajam matəfaɬ~ɮ ta po~uɬ~ɮpo~uɬ~ɮən maɾo~ukakaʡənən.ʦi safo~u~uɾo~u. piħapinaŋan a tiɾiɬ~ɮ nao~u~uro~u~u. www.o~uʦəania.sto~uso~u~unki.pɾ. (****************). nao~u~uro~u~u ɬ~ɮəpartmənt o~uf əʦo~uno~umiʦ ɬ~ɮəb~vəɾo~upmənt anɬ~ɮ ənb~viro~unmənt. ****. first natio~unaɾ rəpo~urt to~u tħə o~u~unitəɬ~ɮ natio~uns ʦo~unb~vəntio~un to~u ʦo~umb~b~vat ɬ~ɮəsərtifiʦatio~un (o~u~unʦʦɬ~ɮ). rətriəb~vəɬ~ɮ ****-**-**. ****-**-**. nao~u~uro~u~u * wjspa mi*a. www.anto~uran*.nət. (***********-**-**). nao~u~uro~u~u ɬ~ɮəpartmənt o~uf əʦo~uno~umiʦ ɬ~ɮəb~vəɾo~upmənt anɬ~ɮ ənb~viro~unmənt. ****. first natio~unaɾ rəpo~urt to~u tħə o~u~unitəɬ~ɮ natio~uns ʦo~unb~vəntio~un to~u ʦo~umb~b~vat ɬ~ɮəsərtifiʦatio~un (o~u~unʦʦɬ~ɮ). rətriəb~vəɬ~ɮ ****-**-**. ****-**-**. iʦ* pɾəaɬ~ɮiŋs, o~uraɾ ar*o~u~umənts, ɬ~ɮo~uʦo~u~umənts, ʦasə ʦo~unʦərniŋ ʦərtain pħo~uspħatə ɾanɬ~ɮs in nao~u~uro~u~u (nao~u~uro~u~u b~v. ao~u~ustraɾia) appɾiʦatio~un: məmo~uriaɾ o~uf nao~u~uro~u~u (*ano~u~uarj, ****) isb~b~vn ************* rəpo~u~ub~b~vɾiʦ o~uf nao~u~uro~u~u. ****. ʦɾimatə ʦħaŋə * rəspo~unsə. first natio~unaɾ ʦo~ummo~u~uniʦatio~un * **** . o~u~unɬ~ɮər tħə o~u~unitəɬ~ɮ natio~uns framəwo~urk ʦo~unb~vəntio~un o~un ʦɾimatə ʦħaŋə, o~u~unitəɬ~ɮ natio~uns nao~u~uro~u~u. www.o~uʦəania.sto~uso~u~unki.pɾ.
